"'''Captain Threepio'''" is a comic short story that appears in ''[[Star Wars Tales 8]]''. It was written and drawn by [[Ryan Kinnaird]].

==Plot summary==
When a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] carrying a cargo of [[Droid/Legends|droids]] on a secret mission is attacked by [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]], it is left to [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]], aided by a data module storing the combat experiences of [[Raymus Antilles/Legends|Raymus Antilles]], to take the helm and save the day. C-3PO activates all the droids as his crew. Using Nagnol gas as a cover, C-3PO pilots into an asteroid field were the pirates blindly crash into asteroids. In the end, C-3PO fails to recall the experience.

{{Plot|comic}}
